channel.title: Huddle
channel.description: Your first read on Capitol Hill politics and policy.

item.title: House revolt ahead for housing bill
item.description: The Senate is on track to easily pass a housing affordability package today that is dead in the House — an ominous sign for any GOP affordability measures.
item.dc:creator: By Mia McCarthy, Katherine Hapgood and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Mia McCarthy, Katherine Hapgood and Calen Razor

item.title: GOP wants to move past the SAVE America Act
item.description: Congressional Republicans aren’t allowing President Donald Trump’s SAVE America Act ultimatum to uproot their legislative agenda ahead of the midterms.
item.dc:creator: By Calen Razor and Mia McCarthy
item.dc:contributor: By Calen Razor and Mia McCarthy

item.title: Trump’s Doral demands ripple through GOP
item.description: President Donald Trump’s demand that Congress pass an expanded version of the SAVE America Act is creating headaches for both chambers.
item.dc:creator: By Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor

item.title: Republicans face new Trump ultimatum
item.description: House Republicans are descending on President Donald Trump’s Doral resort today for their annual policy retreat, with hopes of sketching out their legislative priorities before the midterms.
item.dc:creator: By Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor

item.title: Mullin’s sudden exit shakes up the Hill agenda
item.description: Republicans cheered President Donald Trump’s decision to oust Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem and replace her with Sen. Markwayne Mullin — some quietly, some less so. But the fallout from the DHS switcheroo could play out for weeks yet on Capitol Hill.
item.dc:creator: By Calen Razor and Mia McCarthy
item.dc:contributor: By Calen Razor and Mia McCarthy

item.title: Nervous GOP waits for Trump’s Texas pick
item.description: Senate Republicans are holding their breath ahead of President Donald Trump’s critical choice in Texas: an establishment GOP candidate vs. a MAGA firebrand.
item.dc:creator: By Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor

item.title: Democrats get their Texas dream scenario
item.description: Maybe, just maybe, this is the year Texas really matters.
item.dc:creator: By Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor

item.title: Rubio works to stave off a revolt on Iran
item.description: The White House is trying to stave off a revolt on Capitol Hill against its military actions in Iran, as both chambers are set to vote on resolutions this week that would put guardrails on President Donald Trump’s unilateral use of military force.
item.dc:creator: By Calen Razor and Mia McCarthy
item.dc:contributor: By Calen Razor and Mia McCarthy

item.title: Trump’s Iran gamble hits the Hill
item.description: President Donald Trump’s expanding assault on Iran is poised to pass its first political test on Capitol Hill this week, despite emerging economic fallout and his own warning about more American casualties to come.
item.dc:creator: By Calen Razor and Mia McCarthy
item.dc:contributor: By Calen Razor and Mia McCarthy

item.title: Dems’ affordability agenda TBD
item.description: House Democrats are hoping to solidify their legislative agenda on affordability as midterm campaigning starts to heat up. So far, they don’t know what’s in it.
item.dc:creator: By Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor

item.title: GOP bets on immigration fight, not big bills
item.description: Republicans are betting that Donald Trump just handed them a political lifeline on immigration. But when it comes to demands for legislative action, the president’s big speech this week gave Congress little to do.
item.dc:creator: By Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor

item.title: Trump’s SOTU demands for Congress
item.description: During his SOTU speech, President Donald Trump sprinkled in a handful of legislative demands that have uneven prospects at best on Capitol Hill. Here's what caught our ears.
item.dc:creator: By Calen Razor and Mia McCarthy
item.dc:contributor: By Calen Razor and Mia McCarthy

item.title: Trump faces midterms reality check
item.description: President Donald Trump is heading into one of his most high-profile moments of the midterm year as he grapples with plunging public opinion and growing congressional dissent.
item.dc:creator: By Calen Razor and Mia McCarthy
item.dc:contributor: By Calen Razor and Mia McCarthy

item.title: Trump’s SOTU clouded by chaos
item.description: President Donald Trump is heading into Tuesday’s State of the Union facing a messy Capitol Hill backdrop: a Supreme Court smackdown of his global tariffs, fresh GOP anxiety over the political fallout and a DHS funding standoff that’s revealing chaos within his own administration.
item.dc:creator: By Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor

item.title: GOP clings to megabill 2.0 dream
item.description: A number of Republicans are holding out hope for another party-line megabill, even if President Donald Trump is throwing cold water on the idea.
item.dc:creator: By Mia McCarthy
item.dc:contributor: By Mia McCarthy

item.title: GOP braces for a surveillance showdown
item.description: Congress is barreling toward an April 20 deadline that could pit Republican hard-liners against the White House over federal surveillance authorities.
item.dc:creator: By Mia McCarthy
item.dc:contributor: By Mia McCarthy

item.title: GOP sidesteps Trump’s mail voting demands
item.description: President Donald Trump wants to end mail-in voting as Americans know it — but congressional Republicans aren’t answering his call.
item.dc:creator: By Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor

item.title: Massie’s warning for Trump
item.description: Thomas Massie sees a growing threat ahead for President Donald Trump and Speaker Mike Johnson.
item.dc:creator: By Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor

item.title: Dems prepare DHS counteroffer
item.description: Democrats are poised to make the next move in DHS funding talks, with what’s likely to be a lengthy shutdown taking effect in less than 24 hours.
item.dc:creator: By Calen Razor, Mia McCarthy and Zachary Warmbrodt
item.dc:contributor: By Calen Razor, Mia McCarthy and Zachary Warmbrodt

item.title: Senate heads into doomed DHS votes
item.description: A DHS shutdown is coming tomorrow night, and there’s no telling how long it could last.
item.dc:creator: By Calen Razor and Mia McCarthy
item.dc:contributor: By Calen Razor and Mia McCarthy

item.title: House set to rebuke Trump’s tariffs
item.description: The House is set to rebuke Donald Trump’s signature economic policy Wednesday following Speaker Mike Johnson’s failure late last night to contain GOP unrest over the administration’s trade war.
item.dc:creator: By Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor

item.title: Dems demand more from GOP on DHS
item.dc:creator: By Calen Razor and Mia McCarthy
item.dc:contributor: By Calen Razor and Mia McCarthy

item.title: GOP preps DHS punt
item.description: With fewer than five days to go before a DHS shutdown, Senate Democrats have put bill text for a full-year funding compromise on the table. But another punt is probably still the best-case scenario, and it’s by no means guaranteed.
item.dc:creator: By Calen Razor and Mia McCarthy
item.dc:contributor: By Calen Razor and Mia McCarthy

item.title: SAVE Act surge pressures GOP leaders
item.description: The House is gearing up to vote next week on a policy matter that’s rapidly galvanizing the GOP and causing new headaches for Republican leaders — voter registration rules.
item.dc:creator: By Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor
item.dc:contributor: By Mia McCarthy and Calen Razor

item.title: The Dems not opposed to another DHS punt
item.description: A sizable number of Senate Democrats haven’t ruled out another short-term funding punt for the Department of Homeland Security.
item.dc:creator: By Calen Razor and Mia McCarthy
item.dc:contributor: By Calen Razor and Mia McCarthy

item.title: Lawmakers brace for a DHS shutdown
item.dc:creator: By Calen Razor and Mia McCarthy
item.dc:contributor: By Calen Razor and Mia McCarthy

item.title: Shutdown hinges on razor-thin rule vote
item.description: House Republican leaders are facing a white-knuckle vote this morning as they move to end the partial shutdown after four days.
item.dc:creator: By Mia McCarthy, Calen Razor and Zachary Warmbrodt
item.dc:contributor: By Mia McCarthy, Calen Razor and Zachary Warmbrodt

item.title: Mike Johnson’s shutdown gamble
item.description: House GOP leaders face an uphill battle to pass the revamped government funding package from the Senate, potentially dragging out the shutdown.
item.dc:creator: By Calen Razor, Mia McCarthy and Zachary Warmbrodt
item.dc:contributor: By Calen Razor, Mia McCarthy and Zachary Warmbrodt

item.title: Senate shutdown deal hits a Graham snag
item.description: A partial shutdown of multiple federal agencies is a little over 19 hours away as the Senate deals with a Lindsey Graham-sized snag and House Republicans face pressure from President Donald Trump to expedite whatever the other chamber sends their way.
item.dc:creator: By Mia McCarthy, Calen Razor and Benjamin Guggenheim
item.dc:contributor: By Mia McCarthy, Calen Razor and Benjamin Guggenheim

item.title: Senators march into a doomed funding vote
item.description: Senators widely expect the six-bill funding package to fail to advance today, almost certainly guaranteeing a partial shutdown come 12:01 a.m. Saturday.
item.dc:creator: By Mia McCarthy, Calen Razor, Benjamin Guggenheim and Victoria Guida
item.dc:contributor: By Mia McCarthy, Calen Razor, Benjamin Guggenheim and Victoria Guida
